rows.title: 2026 pre-launch warning and test-mode submissions
changes: Added a one-time per-session warning modal for 2026 pre-launch status.
Enabled live contract submissions only for franchise 0008.
All other franchises now submit MYM/restructure as local test-mode data.

rows.title: Production rollout
changes: Deployed the current CCC and standings work to production.
Standings now default to production-source snapshots.
Added Settings release log with visible in-app version tracking.

rows.title: Dev stabilization
changes: Added sortable standings table views and race views.
Added tag hard-exclusion handling for Kyler Murray / Calamari.
